name: HRT_REVIEW_PERIODS_VL
query: SELECT RPB.REVIEW_PERIOD_ID, RPB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RPTL.REVIEW_PERIOD_NAME, RPTL.DESCRIPTION, RPB.START_DATE, RPB.END_DATE, RPB.STATUS_CODE, RPB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RPB.CREATED_BY, RPB.CREATION_DATE, RPB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RPB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RPB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_REVIEW_PERIODS_B RPB, HRT_REVIEW_PERIODS_TL RPTL WHERE RPB.REVIEW_PERIOD_ID = RPTL.REVIEW_PERIOD_ID AND RPTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
